title: Budget 2016–17: Farmers Have Got Their Due Share

summary.about: A focused assessment of the Indian budget’s treatment of farmers and rural development.
summary.audience: Agricultural policymakers, rural-development practitioners and budget readers.
summary.method: Provides a qualitative expert commentary rather than a comprehensive quantitative budget analysis.
summary.insights: Higher rural allocations are justified, but agricultural growth depends on whether announced programs are implemented effectively.
